creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #0)
/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/pythran/pythonic/types/str.hpp:407:12: error: no matching constructor for initialization of 'typename str::reverse_iterator' (aka 'reverse_iterator<(anonymous namespace)::pythonic::types::string_iterator>')
    return {data->rbegin()};

Looks like devel/py-pythran is having a problem.
